hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); filepath=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"); if [[ "$filepath" == *.py ]]; then ruff check --fix --quiet "$filepath" && ruff format --quiet "$filepath"; fi'
bash -c 'input=$(cat); filepath=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"); if [[ "$filepath" == *.py ]]; then mypy --strict --no-error-summary "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); count=$(echo "$cmd" | grep -oE "ollama (run|serve)" | wc -l); if [ "$count" -gt 1 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Never load two models simultaneously" >&2; exit 1; fi'
